changes.purpose: Orchestration agent registration protocol — 6 canonical agents with stratum assignment, synchronization contracts, mutation authority, and cross-stratum interaction validation via stratum_boundary.py
Adaptive enrichment suggestion system — confidence gap analysis, debt persistence detection, unenriched candidate identification, enrichment saturation detection, with operator approval workflow

Convergence maturity progression framework — DESCRIPTIVE→EMERGENT→ESTABLISHED lifecycle with specimen count thresholds, operator-only promotion, demotion on counter-evidence, convergence observation registry
Learning-to-capability pipeline — bridges CONSUMABLE learning events to pipeline parameterization via 5 capability domains, 3 impact levels, cross-specimen scanning
